previous_text:
11443 results, showing 1 to 20
On 24 March 2026, the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) granted an exemption under section 56GD of the Competition and Consumer Act 2010 (Cth) to Credabl Pty Ltd deferring its product data sharing obligations until 13 July 2027, and consumer data sharing obligations until 10 May 2030.
The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) has accepted a court enforceable undertaking from Aidacare Pty Ltd (Aidacare) in relation to unfair contract terms and false or misleading representations about consumers’ rights to remedies for faulty products that were likely to contravene sections 23 and 29(1)(m) of the Australian Consumer Law (ACL).
